bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

并发策略与 Turbo Engine 相关能力

  • 变更说明: 新增并发策略与 Turbo Engine 相关能力，覆盖后端会话管理、前端工具函数和提案流程，便于更稳定地处理并行执行场景。
  • 影响范围: 影响 concurrency 相关功能、分布式会话运行时、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

主题化喝水提醒与多种提醒样式

  • 变更说明: 新增主题化喝水提醒与多种提醒样式，并补充 Alibaba PuHuiTi 内置字体支持，界面体验更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 hydration 相关功能、fonts 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

Git 与运行时能力

  • 变更说明: 增强 Git 与运行时能力，新增直接路径 Git 状态查询、Git 快照缓存，以及更细粒度的 AI 重试提示和模型健康检查。
  • 影响范围: 影响 Git 与仓库工具、health 相关功能、ai 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

整理并合并数据库提供程序抽象层

  • 变更说明: 整理并合并数据库提供程序抽象层，移除了 PostgreSQL 专用数据层项目，并补充旧配置兼容保护。
  • 影响范围: 影响 data 相关功能、backend 相关功能、Web 客户端流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话与 SignalR 连接管理

  • 变更说明: 优化会话与 SignalR 连接管理，改进延迟关闭和监控状态处理，减少实时状态抖动与异常噪音。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、ai-monitoring 相关功能、Web 客户端流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

51La analytics 集成

  • 变更说明: 移除了 51La analytics 集成，并同步清理相关前端与索引生成配置。
  • 影响范围: 影响 index 相关功能、analytics 相关功能、tools 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Concurrency policy and Turbo Engine support

  • Change Summary: Added concurrency policy and Turbo Engine support across backend session management, frontend utilities, and proposal flows to better handle parallel execution scenarios.
  • Impact: Affects Concurrency, distributed session runtime, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing concurrency policy and turbo engine support entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Themed hydration reminders

  • Change Summary: Added themed hydration reminders with multiple reminder styles, plus bundled Alibaba PuHuiTi font support for a more complete UI experience.
  • Impact: Affects Hydration, Fonts, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing themed hydration reminders entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Git and runtime capabilities

  • Change Summary: Expanded Git and runtime capabilities with direct-path Git status queries, Git snapshot caching, more localized AI retry prompts, and model-aware health checks.
  • Impact: Affects Git and repository tools, Health, Ai.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Consolidated the database provider abstraction layer

  • Change Summary: Consolidated the database provider abstraction layer, removed the PostgreSQL-specific data project, and added compatibility guards for legacy configuration.
  • Impact: Affects Data, Backend, web client flows.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session and SignalR lifecycle handling

  • Change Summary: Improved session and SignalR lifecycle handling with deferred close behavior and refined monitoring state updates to reduce noisy real-time state transitions.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Ai Monitoring, web client flows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session and signalr lifecycle handling entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

51La analytics integration

  • Change Summary: Removed 51La analytics integration and cleaned up the related frontend and index-generator configuration.
  • Impact: Affects Index, Analytics, Tools.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
